message:
fix(reaper): escalations to ephemeral, reaper purges old mail

Two changes to stop HQ issue pollution:

1. Escalation beads now created with --ephemeral --wisp-type=escalation,
   so they go to the wisps table and get reaped automatically.

2. Reaper gains a mail purge step: DELETEs closed gt:message issues
   older than 30 days. Skips open mail so unread messages to parked
   rigs dont vanish. Uses same batch-delete pattern as wisp purge.

Root cause: overnight patrol generated 22 escalation issues and 103
mail delivery issues in HQ, nearly half the table was operational
noise that never got cleaned up.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -172,6 +172,8 @@ func (b *Beads) CreateEscalationBead(title string, fields *EscalationFields) (*I
 		"--title=" + title,
 		"--description=" + description,
 		"--type=task",
+		"--ephemeral",
+		"--wisp-type=escalation",
 		"--labels=gt:escalation",
 	}
